# Web Scraper Agent — requirements
# Install: pip install -r requirements.txt

# ── LangGraph / LangChain ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
langgraph>=0.2.0
langchain>=0.3.0
langchain-core>=0.3.0

# ── HTTP / Scraping ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
httpx>=0.27.0              # async HTTP client (replaces requests)
beautifulsoup4>=4.12.0     # HTML parsing
lxml>=5.2.0                # fast BS4 parser backend
playwright>=1.44.0         # JS-rendered pages (install browsers: playwright install chromium)

# ── Data validation ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
pydantic>=2.7.0            # schema validation (v2 only)

# ── Caching ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
diskcache>=5.6.0           # file-based TTL cache (no Redis needed)

# ── Utilities ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
python-dotenv>=1.0.0       # .env loading (for future API keys)
